behavior: Set the status of a task

input.name: taskState
input.note: Task 的新狀態 (TODO, DOING, TEST, REVIEW, DONE)

domainModelNotes: requireNotNull("Task ID is not null", ()-> taskId)
requireNotNull("Task State is not null", ()-> taskState)

testScenarios.name: should_set_task_status_from_TODO_to_DOING
testScenarios.given: Task 處於 TODO 狀態
testScenarios.when: 呼叫 SetTaskStatusUseCase 將狀態改為 DOING
then: Task 狀態應變更為 DOING
Event 應包含正確的 previousState (TODO) 和 newState (DOING)

testScenarios.name: should_set_task_status_from_DOING_to_TEST
testScenarios.given: Task 處於 DOING 狀態
testScenarios.when: 呼叫 SetTaskStatusUseCase 將狀態改為 TEST
then: Task 狀態應變更為 TEST
Event 應包含正確的 previousState (DOING) 和 newState (TEST)

testScenarios.name: should_set_task_status_from_TEST_to_REVIEW
testScenarios.given: Task 處於 TEST 狀態
testScenarios.when: 呼叫 SetTaskStatusUseCase 將狀態改為 REVIEW
then: Task 狀態應變更為 REVIEW

testScenarios.name: should_set_task_status_from_REVIEW_to_DONE
testScenarios.given: Task 處於 REVIEW 狀態
testScenarios.when: 呼叫 SetTaskStatusUseCase 將狀態改為 DONE
then: Task 狀態應變更為 DONE

testScenarios.name: should_allow_moving_task_back_to_previous_state
testScenarios.given: Task 處於 TEST 狀態
testScenarios.when: 呼叫 SetTaskStatusUseCase 將狀態改回 DOING
then: Task 狀態應變更為 DOING

testScenarios.name: should_fail_when_task_not_found
testScenarios.given: PBI 存在但 Task 不存在
testScenarios.when: 嘗試設定不存在的 Task 狀態
then: 應包含適當的錯誤訊息

testScenarios.name: should_fail_when_invalid_task_state
testScenarios.when: 嘗試設定無效的狀態值（如 'INVALID'）
then: 應包含無效狀態的錯誤訊息
